name: OpenClaw
description: Runs a self-hosted, local-first personal AI assistant across WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, and Discord. Ships a CLI gateway plus skills, webhooks, and cron for private automation.

skills.name: Messaging-App Assistant
skills.description: Runs a personal AI assistant inside WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and other chat channels.

skills.name: Self-Hosted Gateway
skills.description: Runs a local-first gateway you own, keeping assistant data on your own devices for privacy.

skills.name: Skills & Webhooks
skills.description: Automates tasks with skills, webhooks, and cron jobs triggered from messages or schedules.
